positive: A minimalist, stylized geometric abstract design featuring a cluster of intertwined crescent moons, stars, and celestial rings forming an elegant mandala. The color palette should be monochromatic with metallic gold accents on a deep midnight blue background. Strong contrasts are key, emphasizing clean silhouettes and clean lines. The composition must be centered and suitable for a repeatable print pattern on apparel. Vector art aesthetic, highly intricate details, ethereal, mystical, high contrast, symmetrical, clean lines, perfect for print.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, dirty, noisy, low contrast, amateur drawing, bad composition, extra limbs, cropped, messy
